summary: Implemented a reusable “Trouble opening the app?” dialog and wired it into AuthGate and AppLayout; added AuthGate copy-link logic with toast feedback; added TemplateGallery image error fallback. Static generated assets themselves are not evidenced as added to frontend/public/assets/generated, and some REQ-2/REQ-1 acceptance details are not fully verifiable due to truncation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Help content lists at least: try incognito/private window, try different browser, try different network (mobile data vs Wi‑Fi), and try again later.
missing_requirements.reason: The dialog clearly includes steps for different browser, incognito/private mode, and switching networks, but the “try again later” step is not visible in the provided (truncated) dialog content, so this AC cannot be confirmed from the diff summary.

missing_requirements.requirement: Display the current hostname near the copy button and show the full origin (protocol + host) in a way that can be manually selected if clipboard copy fails.
missing_requirements.reason: AuthGate includes copy-to-clipboard logic and toast success/error, but the UI portion that displays hostname/full origin and supports manual selection is not shown in the truncated diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Ensure all generated static image assets are included under frontend/public/assets/generated and load without 404s (template-paper, template-geo, template-campus, template-grid, logo-mark).
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows code referencing /assets/generated/logo-mark.dim_512x512.png and TemplateGallery handling failed image loads, but does not show any added/modified files under frontend/public/assets/generated or any build/public asset additions. Therefore the presence of the required image files at runtime cannot be verified from the diff summary.

hallucinated_features.description: Added/changed footer attribution link to caffeine.ai with UTM parameters based on window.location.hostname.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not ask for new attribution/marketing links or UTM tracking parameters; this appears to be unrelated to the specified help/copy-link/assets requirements.
